column1: # Major Crypto Exchange and Protocol Failures
# Loss estimates vary across sources; figures are best available estimates and may be revised.

column5: Tokyo exchange handling >70% of BTC trades; hack compromised 650000-850000 BTC; rehabilitation plan began 2021
LUNA price fell from $80 to <$1; UST lost dollar peg; ~$55B market cap destroyed; triggered chain of failures
Failed to honour margin calls after LUNA/UST collapse; forced into liquidation; owed creditors >$3.5B
Chapter 11; had 1.7M users and ~$4.7B in liabilities; tied to 3AC and LUNA exposure
Chapter 11 after 3AC defaulted on $670M loan; >100000 creditors
> $8B in customer funds lost; CEO convicted of fraud; $7.3B recovered by liquidators (as of early 2026)
Nested failure from FTX exposure; owed FTX US $275M; Chapter 11
Owed >$3.4B to creditors; exposed to 3AC and FTX; DCG subsidiary
